title: Hollyland Solidcom C1 Full Duplex Headset Wireless Intercom System,1100ft Team Communication/Group Talk, Single Ear Headset with 1 Master & 5 Remote Headphone Microphone(6 Users)
features: 🎧Full-Duplex Wireless Headset. Solidcom C1 is Hollyland's first true wireless intercom headset with NO Beltpacks or Base Stations. The 6-person C1 headset kit comes with 1 master headset and 5 remote headsets. Adopting the latest technology, C1 works in a 1.9GHz, with up to 1100ft radius LOS range, delay <35ms, Signal-to-Noise Ratio >55dB, and distortion<1%.

🎧Comfortable to Wear & Ready out of the box. Solidcom C1 headset is exquisitely crafted with PC-ABS materials and weighs only 168g, guaranteeing outstanding flexibility and durability. Auto mute by lifting the mic boom. With a 1100ft radius solid signal transmission coverage, your team can keep connected and move freely in socially distanced working scenarios.

🎧Stability and Security. Built on a stable platform with powerful Encryption technology, Solidcom C1 headset prevents people outside the system from hearing your conversation. Designed with a dual-antenna diversity scheme that enhances anti-interference capability, and guarantees secured and constant team communication in complex scenarios.

🎧Wideband Clear Audio Quality. Solidcom C1 wireless intercom headset supports 150Hz-7KHz wideband frequency response with premium AEC performance, ensuring authentic carrier-grade audio quality for effective team coordination. Equipped with a directional microphone that captures the speaker's voice precisely while minimizing the environmental noise.

🎧Rechargeable & Replaceable Battery. Each Solidcom C1 intercom headset comes with 2 lithium batteries for convenient field replacement, keeping the system running with minimal downtime. The 6-set kit comes with 12 batteries and an 8-port charging station. Each battery takes only 2.5h for full charge, and works for about 5h-6h, up to 10h runtime.

Note: Pair the original remote headsets with the master station via a USB-C. Master headset can't pair to Hub, Since it has the same function as the Hub. With hub you could interconnect with multiple Solidcom C1 Hub or other intercom system. What's in the Box? Wide-range Applications Note: Solidcom C1 product security updates until 31 Dec. 2025.
